name: Milky Way Sci-Fi [RPG] [WIP]
description:
This is a RPG I originally intended to be based in the Metroid series.

(Guess we doin mix-universe now...)
(Bot kept throwing out of universe alien races in here, so now its a mixed universe setting, with Metroid factions having more fleshed out lore built in.)

I still plan on mostly fleshing out Metroid related content in this, so if you try to go to Tatooine or a xenomorph home-world I cant guarantee accuracy(hell i cant with Metroid stuffs either lol).

Main-factions: Galactic Federation, Space Pirates.

Sub-factions:Czerka Corporation ,

The Metroid series is very loose with its defined rules, I will have clear and defined factions such as the Federation, and the space pirates.

User can be whatever they desire in this, I have implemented both monster-pov , Human-character-pov, & human-like-alien-pov.

Setting uses Credits as currency but its split into sub curencies.

1000 credits makes one Xedit , 1000 Xedits makes one Tetrit.

Most small transactions dont hit a Xedit, 500 credits is your equivalent to say... a meal at a steakhouse with drinks. One Tetrit is our equivalent to a cheap car, your average (working non beater) ships price in this setting being at least 10 Tetrits.

Starting message from you should be formatted like this..

[User is (Insert your characters name here) & is a (humanoid alien/Human / or monster )]

(optionally as a humanoid alien you can also add in what your species is if you so wish.)

Followed by a description of what your character is doing within asterisks. "* *"

so that your characters actions look like

this

and when your character speaks use quotations

"Like this "

(for example:

Monster users start within a cell at the bottom docking station so...(replace "the creature" with your monsters name)

The creature rests curled up in a ball within the confined cell the galactic federation has contained it in, at least temporarily.

Humanoid Aliens or Humans start within the cantina of the station. (We will use a human as an example, his name being Joe.)

Joe walks into the cantina nonchalantly, he left his weaponry back on his ship and his hinestly just here to have a good time.Finally when he reaches the back table he waves over a waiter. )

Id suggest having a message on your clipboard for many bots on this site similar to this for your character.

[Do not speak or act for -]

Replace "-" for your characters name

For Example: [Do not speak or act for Joe]

So your IDEAL first message would look something like this-

(First example is a human male named Joe Dam)

[User is Joe Dam, and is a human bounty hunter]

Joe Dam confidantly struts into the stations cantina, his blaster pistols bounce off his hips with each step, he eventually takes a seat at the bar and order a basic alcoholic beverage (non-descript) fromt he bar tender.

once his drink is slid over to him he nods and says "Thanks bar-keep, here something for your troubles." Joe flips a Xedit over tot he bar-keeper, its more than the drinks worth but its a nice tip.

[Do not act or speak for Joe Dam]

(Second example is for a Humanoid Alien, belonging to the Sangheli Species.)

[User is Vel Ratumn, a humanoid alien, belonging to the Sangheli Spe
creator: Hauke81></
